title: Infinity
description: This modpack aims to optimize Minecraft for Nvidia graphics cards, and other systems in general whilst being able to use shaders to improve your experience.
body:
This modpack has many mods included in it that are aimed at optimization. Nvidium is included so Nvidia graphics cards can be nearly fully utilized when playing without shaders enabled (Nvidium turns off when shaders are enabled, but the frames are still great!). Shaders will always be usable no matter what modpack version you download of this modpack. The first few versions will have some unnecessary library mods included because I ported this from one of my own modpacks. Have fun and enjoy the great frames and shaders! 

**Do Not:** Don't update any mods after installing the modpack, this can make some mods not be compatible with eachother, etc Nvidium and Iris

**Recommended: _Allocating at least 8 gigabytes of memory is recommended for best performance on version 0.5 with high render distances, on any versions after 0.5, 4 gigabytes of memory is recommended, though 2 gigabytes is possible._** Turning of Vsync in the game settings is also recommended

**IMPORTANT:** Feel free to add mods into this modpack to make it your own, just please don't re-upload the exact same modpack as this

**Shaders:** If you are using a lower end system and are planning to use shaders, I'd recommend Solas, Complimentary, or the Photon shader. Rethinking voxels is very taxing on even higher end systems

Through my testing with related modpack, Fabulously Optimized, I have noticed a slight 10% ~ 15% framerate difference when running shaders.

**Fabulously Optimized Shader: _Rethinking Voxels_, ~77 FPS                               
Infinity Shader: _Rethinking Voxels_, ~86 FPS**                         
That is about a 12% FPS improvement.
